title: The Tensor Tympani Muscle and Middle Ear Myoclonus
phrases: "What we call 'stuck' is usually the body doing exactly what it was designed to do under conditions that no longer exist."
"The research is clear on this, and it contradicts almost everything popular culture teaches."
"Complexity is the ego's favorite hiding place."
"You cannot think your way into a felt sense of safety. The body has its own logic."
researchers: Richard Davidson (neuroscience of meditation, emotional styles)

title: Eustachian Tube Dysfunction and Perceived Sound Changes
phrases: "You don't arrive at peace. You stop walking away from it."
"If your spiritual practice makes you more rigid, it's not working."
"What we call 'the present moment' is not a place you go. It's the only place you've ever been."
interjections: And this is the part nobody talks about.

title: How TMJ Disorders Create and Amplify Tinnitus
phrases: "The algorithm of your attention determines the landscape of your experience."
"The paradox of acceptance is that nothing changes until you stop demanding that it does."
"Stillness is not something you achieve. It's what's already here beneath the achieving."
"We are not our thoughts, but we are responsible for our relationship to them."
interjections: I get it. Really, I do.
researchers: Josef Rauschecker (Georgetown neuroscientist, tinnitus brain mapping)
